name: claude-pr-review
description: Review GitHub PRs with Claude Code using the review-master skill workflow.

commands.title: Claude PR Review: Run review-master on PR
Claude PR Review: Review diff between remote and local branch
Claude PR Review: Open Claude Code (use /review-master)

claudePrReview.claudeExecutable.description: Path or name of the Claude Code CLI (e.g. claude).

claudePrReview.skillPath.description: Override path to SKILL.md. Empty uses the extension bundle (out/SKILL.md from src/SKILL.md), then ~/.claude/skills/review-master/SKILL.md if present.

claudePrReview.allowedTools.description: Comma-separated --allowedTools value for headless claude -p (permission rule syntax).

claudePrReview.maxTurns.description: Maximum agent turns for headless review (--max-turns).

claudePrReview.outputFormat.description: When live stream is off: claude -p --output-format. Ignored while live stream is on (uses stream-json).

claudePrReview.liveStreamOutput.description: Use stream-json with verbose partial messages so output and progress update during the run (avoids stdin wait + line-buffered silence).
